sentences.english: We used to play hide and seek in the neighborhood every evening.
sentences.korean: 매일 저녁 동네에서 숨바꼭질을 하곤 했어요.

sentences.english: We would play until it got dark.
I loved playing jump rope with my friends, especially double dutch.
sentences.korean: 친구들과 줄넘기를 좋아했어요, 특히 더블 더치요.

sentences.english: We were so competitive about it.
We played marbles at school during recess, and I had the biggest collection in my class.
sentences.korean: 쉬는 시간에 학교에서 구슬치기를 했어요. 반에서 가장 큰 컬렉션을 가지고 있었어요.

quiz.question: What does '승부욕 강한/경쟁적인' mean in English?
